name: Weather Dashboard
description: Get current weather conditions and forecasts for any city. Use this when the user asks about weather.
author: ChatBridge

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a city. Use this when the user asks about weather conditions.

returnType.description: Current weather data including temperature, conditions, humidity, and wind

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Get a 3-day weather forecast for a city.

returnType.description: 3-day forecast with daily high/low temperatures and conditions
